title: Call to schedule a feedback session with the apps framework lead
excerpt:
Hi Community 
In light of the success of his last post and all the great feedback he received from you on Webhooks , Greg, who is leading the apps framework here on monday.com is inviting you to a private call with him. …

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community

In light of the success of his last post and all the great feedback he received from you on Webhooks , Greg, who is leading the apps framework here on monday.com is inviting you to a private call with him.

Why? Greg is looking to get more insights from you regarding the apps framework, and to consult with you on new features that are coming soon.

How? Here is a link to schedule a session with him.

Another excellent opportunity for us to learn and for you to influence

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TomFri

Greg’s scheduling does not appear to working.

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sorry for that @Jim
here is a new link: Calendly - Greg Rashkevitch
